text.title: DDD Value Objects Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping identity-need + mutation-need to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the concept have a stable identity that survives attribute changes?

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology: this is an Entity — apply ddd-aggregates instead

branch.question: Does the lifetime require attribute mutation?

conclusion.verdict: redesign: model state changes by returning new VO instances; mutation is forbidden
proceed: immutable record + constructor validation + value equality + operations return new instances

text.example: needs_identity=false (two Money(10, USD) are interchangeable) → needs_mutation=false → frozen dataclass + currency/amount validation + .add(other) returns Money.
